positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. The central subject is a group of silhouetted, gnarled trees with glowing roots and glowing, geometric flora. The atmosphere is magical and ethereal. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints, rendered with thick, clean linework and flat planes of vibrant color (deep indigo, electric teal, and soft gold). Composition: Central, symmetrical, suitable for seamless looping or large print placement. Lighting: Strong rim lighting highlighting the edges of the branches and glowing elements. Detail: Highly vectorized, clean silhouette art, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Aspect ratio 1:1.
negative: blurry, artifacts, grain, text, logo, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, cartoon, photographic, realistic, signature
